message:
chore: add beads ephemeral DB artifacts to .gitignore

Ignore .br_recovery/, bad DB snapshots (beads.db.bad_*, -shm.bad_*,
-wal.bad_*), rebuild files (beads.db.rebuild_*), and recovery
directories that accumulate from br doctor/repair operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,6 +73,14 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 # Beads history snapshots (JSONL export is tracked, history is local)
 .beads/.br_history/
 
+# Beads ephemeral DB artifacts (bad snapshots, rebuilds, recovery)
+.beads/.br_recovery/
+.beads/beads.db.bad_*
+.beads/beads.db-shm.bad_*
+.beads/beads.db-wal.bad_*
+.beads/beads.db.rebuild_*
+.beads/recovery_*/
+
 # Ephemeral debug/test output files (agent artifacts)
 row_skip_dy*
 --graph-format.svg
